title: Matter that may be disposed at sea - Canada.ca
content:
## Matter that may be disposed at sea
Schedule 5 of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 provides a list of substances that, under the Convention on the Prevention of Marine Pollution by Dumping of Wastes and Other Matter, otherwise known as the London Convention, 1972, and the 1996 Protocol to the Convention, are allowed to be disposed of at sea.
Schedule 5 , Waste or Other Matter, (Subsections 122(1) and 135(2) and section 216)
Permits search results
